{{Quote|Are you looking to book the swoop course for a run?|translated=1|T'sllth greeting a client|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''T'sllth''' was a [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked with [[Sslamoth]] to run the [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] races in [[Ahto City]] in [[3956 BBY]]. With Sslamoth, they cooperated the [[Ahto City swoop track]].
